text: Turn 3 finished. Let me process the full multi-turn capture:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input:
{"command": "kill %1 2>/dev/null
RUN_DIR=$(ls -dt /tmp/claude_captures/run_* | head -1)
echo "=== Run: $(basename $RUN_DIR) ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR" | grep "_summary.txt$" | grep -v response | sed 's/_[0-9]*.*//' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
echo ""
python3 build_viz_data.py "$RUN_DIR" 2>&1
cp -r "$RUN_DIR" claude_captures/$(basename $RUN_DIR)
echo "Copied"", "description": "Process multi-turn capture", "timeout": 60000}
